chunks.text: Siemens Calibre Software - UCB EECS License Siemens Calibre Software - UCB EECS License public page Siemens Calibre (formerly Mentor Graphics) licenses are available within EECS on an EECS instructional license server. Access is limited to studen

al license server. Access is limited to students and employees in EECS classes and research groups on EECS subnets. Computers in EECS instructional labs access these licenses. Faculty, grad students and staff with funded EECS accounts may

students and staff with funded EECS accounts may get license information here for their own computers (login with your EECS LDAP account and password) Please see calibre.help for more information about Siemens Calibre on the EECS instructional c
about Siemens Calibre on the EECS instructional computers. EECS Instructional Support Group (ISG) WEB: http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst email: inst@eecs.berkeley.edu Thu Mar 19 05:32:36 PDT 2026
